context: A military aircraft designed primarily for air-to-air combat with other aircraft
Any fixed-wing or rotary-wing aircraft operated by military forces for combat or support missions
Restrictive measures imposed by one or more countries against another country, entity, or individual to coerce policy change
A coordinated national effort to develop nuclear technology for energy, medicine, or weapons
The United Nations Security Council, responsible for maintaining international peace and security
A temporary suspension of hostilities by agreement between opposing forces in a conflict
The supreme authority of a state to govern itself without external interference
Official relationships between two nations conducted through ambassadors and diplomatic missions

en: The United States imposed new sanctions on Iran over its nuclear program.
ar: فرضت الولايات المتحدة عقوبات جديدة على إيران بسبب برنامجها النووي.
context: US-Iran geopolitical escalation regarding nuclear non-proliferation compliance

en: The Security Council convened an emergency session to discuss the ceasefire agreement in the region.
ar: عقد مجلس الأمن جلسة طارئة لمناقشة اتفاق وقف إطلاق النار في المنطقة.
context: UN Security Council response to escalating regional conflict requiring diplomatic intervention

en: American military aircraft conducted reconnaissance operations near the disputed border.
ar: أجرت الطائرات العسكرية الأمريكية عمليات استطلاع بالقرب من الحدود المتنازع عليها.
context: US military surveillance activity near a contested territorial boundary

en: The two nations agreed to restore diplomatic relations after years of tensions.
ar: اتفقت الدولتان على استعادة العلاقات الدبلوماسية بعد سنوات من التوترات.
context: Bilateral diplomatic normalization following prolonged geopolitical dispute
A legal restriction on the sale or supply of weapons and military equipment to a specific country or entity
A UN-authorized deployment of military and civilian personnel to help maintain peace and security in a conflict zone

en: The fighter jets were deployed to enforce the no-fly zone over the northern provinces.
ar: نُشرت الطائرات المقاتلة لفرض منطقة حظر الطيران فوق المحافظات الشمالية.
context: Military enforcement of an aerial exclusion zone to restrict unauthorized flights
